content.problemStatement:
There are NNN players with IDs from 111 to NNN, who are participating in the Javelin throw competition which has two rounds. The first is the qualification round, followed by the final round. The qualification round has gotten over, and you are given the longest distance that each of the NNN players has thrown as A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​. Now, the selection process for the final round happens in the following two steps:



If the longest throw of a player in the qualification round is greater than or equal to the qualification mark of MMM cm, they qualify for the final round.




If after step 111, less than XXX players have qualified for the finals, the remaining spots are filled by players who have thrown the maximum distance among the players who have not qualified yet.



You are given the best throws of the NNN players in the qualification round A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ and the integers MMM and XXX. Print the list of the players who will qualify for the finals in increasing order of their IDs.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers N,M,XN, M, XN,M,X.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.


Output Format

For each test case, print a single line containing K+1K + 1K+1 space-separated integers, where KKK is the number of players qualified.
First, print the integer KKK, then followed by a space, print KKK space-separated integers ID1,ID2,…,IDKID_1, ID_2, \dots, ID_KID1​,ID2​,…,IDK​ where IDiID_iIDi​ denotes the players' ID who qualified for the finals.
You have to print the IDs of the qualified players in increasing order.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111: Since no player crosses the qualification mark, they are chosen based on the distance thrown. So player 333 who has thrown the maximum distance gets selected followed by the player 222. Now since we have got the required number of players, player 111 isn't selected.
Test Case 222: Since all the players cross the qualification mark, they all are selected.
Test Case 333: The player 333 and player 444 cross the qualification mark. So for the third and final spot in the final, the player 111 is selected since he has the maximum distance thrown amongst the remaining two players.
